data.name: The Last Embrace
data.detailed_description:
ABOUT THE GAME 

You play as a young 18 year old girl named Kyra (can be changed early in prologue) and, unknown to her at the time, a vampire, who has been awoken roughly a millennia after her ''death'' to a modern world. But on top of all that, she also has a memory loss, caused by her long slumber and has only portions of her memory left. You will be guiding her through these modern times as she enters a big modern city in which she will be meeting new people while at the same time dealing with her vampiric nature as well as trying to recover her lost memories. Your choices early on determine the path going forward and the consequences of your choices that may not seem immediately apparent but are world changing. But not all is as it seems. A mysterious ancient order and a even more ancient individual pull strings from the shadows, each trying to get the protagonist to their side and help them achieve their ultimate goals.

THE SETTING 

Game takes place in a modern city, in the year 2025. A millennia ago, humanity was facing a new enemy, vampires, who had spread the known world and almost all but destroyed the society at that time. However, humanity was able to band together and get rid of them once and for all, exterminating every last one of them in the process. Or so they thought. Millenia has passed, and vampires became a myth. You wake up as the last of your kind, with a memory loss at that, not able to remember anything about your past after you were turned. So, in this game, there will ever only be one vampire, or two if you decide to turn your love interest into one. The focus of the story is not on your typical hidden vampire society tropes you see in other games and media. In fact, most of the tropes don't apply here at all, or are different in some ways. Here, the focus is solely on you, and how you will navigate this modern world and deal with your vampiric nature. There will be mystery, gore, murder and killing, intrigue, revenge plots, blood, and yes, occasional sex when the story permits it, but sex is NOT the main focus, intriguing story is and adult content is just an icing on the cake.

data.short_description: A young girl, a vampire and last of her kind, wakes up after a thousand years to a modern world. A story focused visual novel with adult elements. Mystery, betrayal, loss and violence await! Shape the future of the protagonist and the world itself!

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OSX 10.15 or better
  • 處理器: Apple M1 or Intel Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Compatible OpenGLR
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12.04+ or Kernel 3.x+ based distributions
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 compatible
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
